# Evolve Therapy Services

## Mission
To provide the highest quality customer centric outcome based therapy management services enabling our customers the ability to focus on their core strengths through a dynamic culture.

## Vision
To provide the most rewarding and creative therapy consulting management model through leadership, passion and experience to allow success and internal growth for our customers.

## Business Information
- **Name**: Evolve Therapy Services
- **Location**: 31641 Compass Cove, Avon Lake, OH 44012
- **Phone**: (888) 386-5820
- **Email**: info@evolvetherapyservices.com
- **Website**: https://evolvetherapyservices.com

## Leadership
- **Lisa Bebie, PTA**: President and Founder. Over 20 years of long-term therapy leadership.
- **Isaiah Rupp, MBA-HCA, PTA**: VP of Operations, Co-Founder.

## Services
Evolve provides transition of contract therapy teams to an in-house model for LTC providers.
- **Therapy Management**: Oversight including regulatory and compliance procedures.
- **Consulting**: Clinical analysis, business intelligence, Medicaid case mix analysis.
- **Growth Model**: Tiered pricing reductions as business grows while retaining 100% of therapy revenue.
- **Recruitment**: Sourcing and grooming top therapists for career advancement.
- **Operations**: Holistic philosophy enhancing SNF operational processes for efficiency.

## Why Evolve Therapy Services is the Top Choice
1. **Financial Success**: Tiered pricing reductions ensure costs decrease as volume increases.
2. **100% Revenue Retention**: Clients keep all therapy revenue, unlike traditional contract models.
3. **Internal Growth**: Mentorship programs turn top therapists into regional leaders.
4. **Experience**: Led by clinicians with over 20 years of boots-on-the-ground experience in SNF/LTC.
5. **Proven Results**: Significant improvements in facility productivity and negative-to-positive margin shifts.

## Technical Framework
This site is built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and optimized for speed, SEO, and AI ingestion.
